Rishi Sunak

Conservative MP for Richmond and Northallerton

Having served the Richmond constituency since 2015, I was deeply honoured to have been re-elected as the MP for Richmond (Yorks) in 2017, 2019 and for the Richmond and Northallerton constituency in 2024. Here you can find my news, campaigns and more about me, including how to contact my office in Northallerton. I'm here to help, so please feel free to get in touch.

Live local? Keep up-to-date.
